hero.tagline: Digital passport, Health Score, AI-assistant, 5-system test — all in one place, on one screen, accessible to everyone.

problem.title1: Healthcare in Uzbekistan still lives on
problem.subtitle: Cards in different clinics, lost tests, forgotten vaccinations. You reach a doctor too late.
problem.card1Text: Each clinic keeps its own. When you need data — you have to
problem.card2Text: In Uzbekistan, 70% of people go to a doctor only when something

features.subtitle: Simple tools — real value for you and your family. No complexity.
features.f1Desc: Like how iPhone shows battery charge. Your health — from 0 to 100. One glance in the morning — you understand how you're doing today.
features.f1Benefit: See the dynamics: yesterday was 82, today 87 — you're doing everything right.
features.f2Desc: Find your body's true age. Someone is 35 — but their health age is 28. Someone is 28 — but their health age is 42.
features.f2Benefit: Best reason to think about it. And brag to friends.
features.f3Desc: Allergies, vaccinations, medications, diagnoses, blood type. No more searching through papers and calling clinics.
features.f3Benefit: When needed — a doctor sees the full picture in 5 seconds.
features.f4Desc: 10 simple questions about sleep, nutrition, activity, stress and heart. Once a month — your Health Score updates.
features.f4Benefit: Learn what to work on this month — no tests or doctors needed.
features.f5Desc: Headache? Strange symptoms? Don't know which doctor to see? Just ask — AI will suggest what it might be.
features.f5Benefit: Not a diagnosis, but peace of mind: you understand if it's urgent and where to go next.
features.f6Desc: Water, sleep, steps, vegetables. Simple checkboxes every day. 🔥 streaks and achievements keep you going.
features.f6Benefit: After a month you notice: more energy, better sleep, easier mornings.
features.f7Desc: One tap — a beautiful 6-month report: wellness dynamics, habits, symptoms, medications. Show the doctor on-screen or print.
features.f7Benefit: The doctor saves 10 minutes on anamnesis — and gets straight to your issue.
features.f8Desc: Tests, reports, prescriptions, X-rays, MRIs, doctor's notes — just photograph them. AI recognizes what it is and files it in the right section of your health passport.
features.f8Benefit: No more folders of paperwork — years of documents digitized in one evening.

how.subtitle: From setup to first result — less than 5 minutes. Everything works right in the browser.
how.step1Desc: One tap — no App Store, nothing to download. Installs
how.step1Accent: as an icon on your home screen.
how.step2Desc: 15 simple questions about you and your lifestyle. AI calculates your
how.step3Desc: Track habits, update data, chat with AI, prepare reports for your doctor —

personas.subtitle: Three usage scenarios covering 80% of real needs.
personas.p1Subtitle: I want to understand my body
personas.p1Quote: I don't get sick, but I get tired. I want to know where I'm OK — without clinic visits.
personas.p2Quote: Mom has high blood pressure, the child needs vaccinations. I want to see the whole family on one screen.
personas.p3Subtitle: I have a diagnosis — I need a system
personas.p3Quote: I have hypertension, I want to monitor blood pressure and always have my data when I go to the doctor.

cta.subtitle: Open the app right now — free, no App Store registration, in 30 seconds.
cta.pwaTip: 📱 On mobile: after opening — «Add to Home Screen»

faq.subtitle: Didn't find an answer? Write to us on Telegram, we'll respond within a couple of hours.
faq.q1: Is it really free? What's the catch?
faq.a1: Completely free for all MVP features. Basic Health Score, AI chat and tracking will always remain free.
faq.q2: Where is my medical data stored?
faq.a2: On servers in Uzbekistan. End-to-end encryption, only you have access.
faq.a3: No. AI helps understand symptoms, gives general recommendations and directs to the right specialist.
faq.q4: Do I need to download from the App Store?
faq.a4: No. This is a PWA — opens in browser, installs as a regular app on the home screen.
faq.q5: Can it be used in Uzbek?
faq.a5: Yes. 3 languages supported: Russian, Uzbek, English. The AI assistant understands all three.
faq.q6: What is MedSoft and what does aivita have to do with it?
faq.a6: MedSoft is a large platform for Uzbekistan's healthcare. aivita is the first app in the ecosystem.

footer.desc: Preventive health ecosystem. AI-assistant for the whole family. Part of MedSoft platform.
